strengths: Three distinct, recognisable real-world objects are clearly identified with stated contexts.
Links between each object and the IA prompt are coherent and well explained.
Justification for inclusion of each object is largely supported by appropriate evidence and references.
Strong description of societal context for the meme and clear presentation of contrasting views on ChatGPT.
weaknesses: Introduction and IA prompt restatement lack precision and student-generated phrasing.
Analysis sometimes relies on descriptive assertions (e.g. equating view counts with reliability) rather than deeper critical evaluation.
Citation details (timestamps, author handles, full references) are inconsistent or incomplete.
Conceptual imprecision in definitions (e.g. belief vs. opinion) and occasional unfinished arguments limit sophistication.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work meets the descriptors of band 7â8: three specific objects with clear contexts, well-explained links to the prompt, and strong justifications supported by evidence. However, uneven depth of analysis, conceptual imprecision and citation weaknesses prevent it from reaching the highest band. Awarding 8 reflects a strong exhibition with room for refinement in critical evaluation and referencing.

annotations.comment: Using âmillions of viewsâ as evidence of reliability conflates popularity with epistemic justification; consider explaining why expert review (not just view count) underpins knowledge.
The conclusion correctly differentiates the three concepts but could synthesize insights across objects to more fully address the IA promptâs complexity.
The Krish (2024) entry has a broken URL and inconsistent punctuation; revise to include a working link and proper formatting.
The IA prompt header could more directly paraphrase the chosen question to frame the exhibition focus in the studentâs own words, strengthening the connection to the prompt.

The introduction is generic and doesnât restate the IA prompt in the studentâs own words; explicitly linking the objects to the prompt in the opening paragraph would clarify the exhibitionâs purpose.
The video screenshot is useful but would benefit from a precise citation (timestamp and URL) to anchor it as a distinct real-world object rather than a generic image.

The definition of knowledge is textbook-level and omits reference to key TOK concepts (e.g. Gettier problems); incorporating TOK terminology and a citation would demonstrate deeper conceptual grounding.
The description of the Kurzgesagt channel is general; specify the videoâs title, upload date and view count to firmly situate this as a specific real-world context.
The paragraph ends abruptly with âThis sole evidence proves theâ; complete the thought and deepen the critical evaluation of the validation process rather than leaving analysis unfinished.
Referring to the follow-up Kurzgesagt video on trust is insightful, but evaluate any potential biases or counterclaims to strengthen the critical perspective.
The concluding claim that distinguishes knowledge from belief and opinion is clear, but reflecting on possible limitations (e.g. contested expert views) would show more nuance.
The heading names the object but omits tweet metadata (author handle, timestamp); including these details would tie it more concretely to a real-world instance.
The meme image should show the original postâs interface (username, date) rather than a cropped image, ensuring clear real-world context.
The societal context is well described, illustrating community belief. This clarity strengthens the justification for choosing this meme as an object.
Personal anecdote adds authenticity but should be supported by data (surveys or studies on this beliefâs prevalence) to move beyond the subjective.
The explanation of belief overlaps with truth is vague; refine the link to the prompt by defining belief more precisely using TOK theory.
The counter-claim is positioned as opinion; develop why this view lacks justification and how that contrasts with the religious belief to sharpen analysis.
The hadith reference is incomplete; provide the exact citation (volume, hadith number, translation) to substantiate the beliefâs justification.
The definition of opinion would benefit from referencing a recognized TOK source to distinguish it more rigorously from knowledge and belief.
The description of ChatGPTâs role in education is clearly contextualized and demonstrates relevance, aiding the objectâs justification.
The IB statement citation needs a full reference and direct quotation; analyze its language to explore precisely why it reflects an opinion stance.
The contrasting institutional views are presented clearly, offering strong evidence of divergent opinions in higher education contexts.
The long paragraph conflates multiple ideas; separate discussion of ethical concerns, policy positions and timeline for clearer structure and stronger justification.
The bibliography heading is formatted correctly, but align entries consistently with an academic style guide (e.g. APA) for full credit.
The X (Twitter) citation mixes math notation and lacks author/date clarity; simplify by using standard referencing (handle, full date) without LaTeX.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
